sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49239" key="qrupte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρυπτέον</orth>, <sense id="n49239.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must crumble</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.12</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
